query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.

samples.sample_name: Arizona Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed Arizona report-cards inventory, the official district detail route, and exact GetEntity detail responses to confirm that local district root fields now exist on a live official host.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 bounded official Arizona report-cards checks beyond the generic inventory call. The public AZ School Report Cards app still exposes /api/Entity/GetEntityList and the live district detail route /districts/Detail/<educationOrganizationId>. The app bundle also reveals the exact local-detail contract: /api/Entity/GetEntity?id=<educationOrganizationId>&fiscalYear=2025 returns district-specific fields including nameOfInstitution, webSite, telephone, and address, and sample live calls for St Johns Unified District (educationOrganizationId 4153), Window Rock Unified District (4154), and Round Valley Unified District (4155) returned first-party district websites plus district phones and addresses. Arizona education therefore is no longer blocked by zero local-root inventory; it is now blocked because those reviewable district roots have not yet been materialized into a county-keyed Arizona district inventory and no district-owned special-education leaves have been verified from them.

samples.sample_name: Arizona School Report Cards District Inventory
samples.evidence_snippet: The official report-cards inventory API returns Arizona LEA rows including St Johns Unified District, Window Rock Unified District, and Round Valley Unified District.

samples.sample_name: St Johns Unified District district detail
samples.evidence_snippet: St Johns Unified District is exposed on the official report-cards host through a district detail route, and the paired GetEntity detail call preserves district website http://www.sjusd.net, phone 928-337-2255, and address 450 S 13th W, St Johns, AZ85936.

samples.sample_name: Window Rock Unified District district detail
samples.evidence_snippet: Window Rock Unified District is exposed on the official report-cards host through a district detail route, and the paired GetEntity detail call preserves district website https://www.wrschool.net/, phone 928-729-6706, and address Navajo Rte 12, Fort Defiance, AZ86504.

samples.sample_name: Round Valley Unified District district detail
samples.evidence_snippet: Round Valley Unified District is exposed on the official report-cards host through a district detail route, and the paired GetEntity detail call preserves district website https://www.elks.net, phone 928-333-6580, and address 940 E MARICOPA DR UNIT B, SPRINGERVILLE, AZ85938-5362.

samples.sample_name: Arizona Department of Education Special Education Challenge Shell
samples.evidence_snippet: The main AZED special-education root still returns the Cloudflare challenge shell, so the local lane must materialize from the report-cards host instead of the challenged AZED host.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed Arizona county-local blocker artifacts, current county-office fallback inventory, and aligned the on-disk packet to evidence-only AHCCCS surfaces after DES discovery proved exhausted.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-22 live Arizona DES candidates. The root, apply-benefits, Family Assistance Administration, FAA, office-locator, contact, robots.txt, and sitemap URLs all returned the Cloudflare "Just a moment..." HTTP 403 shell. The live county_offices table currently contains 14 Arizona rows still anchored to the DOI FAA placeholder https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/AVRHMI and 1 row still anchored to the generic legacy root https://dhhs.arizona.gov/locations, and no authored Arizona county-office leaf packet is currently present on disk to replace them.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DES root returned only a Cloudflare "Just a moment..." shell instead of office-routing content.
The DES sitemap returned the same challenge shell, so the current DES host does not expose a reviewable office-discovery surface.
The live official ALTCS Offices page preserves seven named official offices: Chinle, Flagstaff, Kingman, Phoenix, Prescott, Tucson, and Yuma.

Bundled pdfplumber extraction preserves Arizona county names including Yuma, Mohave, La Paz, Gila, Santa Cruz, Cochise, Graham, Maricopa, Pinal, Apache, Navajo, Coconino, Yavapai, Greenlee, and Pima, but no office-address or county-to-office assignment contract.
Rendered first-page review shows county-administrator letterhead and support-letter text addressed to AHCCCS rather than county office-directory semantics.
Rendered first-page review shows county-administrator support-letter text to AHCCCS rather than a county office-directory contract.
The live official AHCCCS contacts page is reviewable and preserves applicant contact and ALTCS application routing on the accessible AHCCCS host.
The official ALTCS member resource page preserves ALTCS context and application phone routing but does not enumerate counties served by each office.

A bounded filter over the live AHCCCS sitemap surfaced the ALTCS county map and county-admin/support-letter PDFs but no overlooked county-office locator leaf or county-to-office contract on the accessible host.
